MULTI-PURPOSE: Decorating dust sheets are essential for plastering, painting and decorating jobs, protecting floors, carpets, furniture and different surfaces from dust, dirt and paint scatter. Because a small spillage could prove costly to rectify. Paint sheets is a perfect way to protect against unavoidable debris.

WASHABLE AND REUSABLE: High-quality cotton paint cover sheets absorbs paint splashes and is machine washable at low temperatures. Our dust sheets for decorating can be washed and reused over and over again.

FLEXIBLE, STRONGER AND EASY TO USE: Decorators dust sheets perfect for all your home decor or home improvement projects.
